name: Mucky Pup Flea Repellent Shampoo - 475ml
description: Mucky pup flea repellant dog shampoo delivers superb grooming for your precious pooch. Its flea repelling formula is gentle on the skin leaving a healthy, glossy coat. Fantastic cleaning gentle on skin Great coat results. This fabulous body and coat wash utilizes our special formula creating a luxurious lather which rinses easily away giving fantastic results. Directions: Lather into wet coat and rinse well with warm water. Ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamide, MEA, Glycol Distearate, Ethyl , parfum, carboxymethyl, Hydroxyprophyl Guar, Citic Acid, Disodium EDTA, DMDH Hydantoin.
